title: Venture Deals: Be Smarter Than Your Lawyer and Venture Capitalist
subtitle: Be Smarter Than Your Lawyer and Venture Capitalist
rationale: First edition of the book that standardized VC term sheet literacy for founders. Feld (Foundry Group co-founder, Techstars co-chair) and Mendelson (managing director, Foundry Group) bring VC-side and legal-side perspectives. Originally published as a blog series on Feld Thoughts (2005-2007), the 2011 Wiley edition converted the best received posts into a structured four-part book covering term sheet economics, control terms, alternative instruments, VC fund structure, and negotiation. The 9-chapter structure (compared to 19+ in later editions) reflects the original scope focused on a single Series A term sheet. Critically influential: standard distribution at Y Combinator, Techstars, and 500 Startups.
